title: potamogeton alpinus subsp. alpinus
intro: Potamogeton alpinus subsp. alpinus, also known as Alpine Frogbit, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Potamogetonaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Frogbit include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of cystitis, and potentially preventing the formation of kidney stones. Alpine Frogbit can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various urinary system disorders.
